highlights.title: Global Market: Stagflation fears return as Gulf conflict, higher energy prices cloud global outlook
US imposes 10% tariff on India, Pak, Bangladesh, UK, others in forced labour probe
Global Market: European shares steady, set for weekly loss as oil surge, earnings keep investors cautious
IndiGo shares extend losses for third straight day after Q1 miss; down 9% in July
Trump's tariff policy: Abbott India, Ajanta Pharma to Alembic — pharma stocks crash up to 4%
GTRI questions US 10% Section 301 tariff on Indian exports, says measure lacks credible evidence

daily_brief.key_insight: Range-bound tape with 48% breadth. No directional edge — let existing positions work, avoid fresh breakout trades, save dry powder for the next regime shift. Macro flow is mildly negative with 151 policy/global items in focus — factor this into position sizing.
